column1: hey i’m friends with evan with the big group from umass. we’re trying to get more details about the trip we have about 35 people.
hey whats up, cool I got you
can you fill us in on the options? we want to book it today
yea def. last I left off with Evan we were lookin to lock in on our Cancun package, 5 nights, March 15-20. I'll send you a breakdown on what it all looks like
whats your name btw? lol my b
that's awesome, love the spelling. I'm Spiffy
so, I actually gave Evan a deal, our normal rate for the 5 night is $699, but I was able to hook it up with $639
whats your email, I'll send you a longer list of details thatll take me too long to text lol
Loved “so, I actually gave Evan a deal, our normal rate for the 5 night is $699, but I was able to hook it up with $639”
do you know if there is any other options because we just read absolutely awful reviews on this place. everyone is saying not to go

Yea I'll send you a few diff ones. Grand Oasis def has some low reviews, it's honestly primarily the place to be if youre just looking to party all week and dont care as much about the other amenities
I will say, its the biggest party spring break resort in the world, in my opinion. BUT it def lacks in some aspects. like food, rooms are okay.. not top tier, etc.
would you wanna see other destinations too, or do we wanna stick with Cancun?
we're open to other options too
bet. have you been to Punta Cana before for spring break? I know Evan mentioned y'all were interested in there too
do you know what the price would be
i've never been but a group of our friends went before a few years ago

Overall around the same price. I have a perfect option there that has a good balance. rooms are a lot nicer than Grand O, food is def better, and its still a party resort. I'll actually be there myself this spring
do you know which resort they stayed at while they were there?

here's the issue we're running into idk if you can help us on this or not but our biggest issue is the flights. since there are so many of us every time one person books a flight the flight prices are gonna jump in price and just continue getting more expensive
yea flights are def tough. and with a group of 30+ its super unlikely everyone gets the same price if you get it on your own

we can help with flights for the full group, but kinda in the same breath - with a bigger group our rate is gonna be more expensive than what you see online right now so that we can accommodate everyone
if y'all are cool with that, and want to keep things easy and simple, done all in one. we can run it for sure. get you something out of Boston

that would be awesome do you know what the price would be? and also is your plan to buy individual tickets for all of us because we know this would be more expensive or would it be a group flight through the airline?

yea so honestly our operations team is pretty savvy at booking the accommodations. we have partnerships and flight contracts with airlines so depending on the best flight considering times, layovers, for which airline, etc. they book what is best at the time of making the booking
I'll put together a package with flights included, lets first narrow down on where we want to go, and then I can work with the ops team to figure out flight routing, full package pricing, etc
Also if you want to hop on a call to make this easy, just lmk. could be easier to talk it through together
we honestly have no preference. between punta and cancun we'll do whatever is going to be the cheapest hotel wise and lowkey flights too
like just cheapest all together is where we wanna go
Aight bet, easy. I'll work on it all rn
Would you be cool with doing 4 nights stay instead of 5? that'll help me save you a little money with one less night
Or did we want to lock in on 5 nights
also just a reminder that our dates would be march 14-20 that we're available to go so you can pick days based on cheapest options
yup, I got you. gimme like 20ish mins to cook this up
hard no on Grand Oasis? or if its the cheapest all together then were open to it?
hey real quick, if we do a package with flights included, the deposit will be more per person to get their spot secured on the reservation
okay bet. just waiting on one more option rn
thats crazy was literally just typing to you lol
so two options Im seeing rn that work best
Cheapest option for all 30ish of you together, I'm looking at a Cancun 4 night all-inclusive package with flights, airport transportation, our onsite staff etc for $1,299. March 14 - 18
all 30 get the same exact package, reservation. all taxes and fees included. This would be Grand Oasis
with the booze cruise event on it too
March 15 - 19 Bos > Punta Cana, 4 night all the same included above $1389. Occidental Punta Cana package where I'll be
The Krystal Hotel cancun package is a 3rd one actually too. $1389 as well, just keep in mind that ones a little less lit but super nice. March 14 - 18

we want option one. can we get more details? how would you go about doing this? is there a link? can you send me a link or something with an in depth interiors of what's included in this package. I also want to make sure that none of us will have to leave the resort, are there still things to do on the resort? can you send me a link that discusses what's included ?

yea so next step, I set up the reservation in our portal system which ill work on now. each of you follow the link, hit 'join trip' on an open slot, and itll prompt you from there on how to get your account started and secure your spots with the deposit

As far as leaving the resort, you actually dont have to. theres enough to do on the resort itself. the grand o is pretty lit, feels like a campus but in the middle of cancun and bars you can get drinks from for free all day lol. we have on site staff with you there 24/7. the resort is also on the beach

okay that sounds great. Is the flight part going to be included in the link that you send us or are we going to have to do that separately? also would all 30 of us be on the same flight or is it different flights ?

Yea you'll see flights included in the email, reservation link, etc. For flight, you all will be on the same one more than likely, but for the slight chance that the specific flight doesnt have enough seats to fit all of you, I dont wanna 100% guarantee
Im gonna send you an email with everything broken down rn. is there a chance that theres more than 35? just wanna know how many slots to start with
yes i think it will be between 30-35 people
okay cool. I'll do 32 slots for now, eight rooms of 4
and also side note, I know you mentioned not wanting to leave the resort, would you still want the booze cruise included? its technically an off resort event
Most of our travelers go, its open bar, huge boats. pretty dope experience
I was adding it in complimentary
yes we would still want it
Loved “I was adding it in complimentary”
same! will send this over in 5
we really want you to come are you gonna be there
Ahhh I may be in Punta your week lol :/
If we get a big enough Umass squad, I'll switch
oh don't worry we'll get one going
just sent an email over with a full breakdown of everything. whats included, how to get onto the reservation, etc
let me know if you need any help getting on
i am confused by this last part
Ahh okay, so that last part is basically what I explained earlier but in more formal way

your actual flight details wont be shown on your account until each person is paid in full. it says 30 days as a barrier to cover basis, but thats usually when we send all of the trip details, itineraries, how to find the airport transfer service, further details etc. for flights, we cant guarantee the exact flight we get for each person until people start making payments and we're able to make the group purchase
okay our only concern is not being able to see anything about the flights without a deposit or paying in full. that seems a little scam like to us. We really want to make sure this is legit
also we would need the deposit to be pushed back. we're not gonna be able to get all 32 people to pay $500 by today is that possible?
do you think a call would be more efficient
Totally see where you're coming from. I can assure you we're not here to scam anyone at all. a lot more to lose than gain from any of that
down to hop on a call! Would just need a few mins, just getting back in
Bout to give you a ring!
is this price of 1299 guaranteed because we just read something that said it is subject to change
yup! so thats another formality. once you deposit, your price is locked in. but for someone that hops in, say, a week from now, theres no guarantee that theyll get the same price
It's just to let ppl know that this price may not be the same later on
do i get any perks or discounts for getting this many people on board?
Yeaaa I can def hook you up!
a bunch are putting in deposits right now let me know if you see them coming in
Couple others in the process looks like
Hi my friend just texted that someone out their name down twice. is there a way for you to remove someone? if so could you remove jack stone from room 4
do you know what the new deadline for the deposit is
I was able to get through the 26th! that cool?
yes that is perfect i will let everyone know thank you
okay dope. heard from Evan yesterday too btw, just lmk if y'all have anymore people who would like to join in
perfect and yes i will keep you posted

my friend just texted me this do you think it will be an issue? "hey for the website that we registered on for the rooms i spelled my name O’sullivan and not O’Sullivan by accident and I can’t seem to change it. i think it’s fine for payments and stuff but once they start booking flights it may be an issue but im not sure what to do maybe spiffy can change it on his end?"

Hi Spiffy i know this is a crazy ask and i understand if your not able to but would we be able to add 12-14 more spots? someone in our group just asked but i told them if you couldn't i would just give those kids your number to sign up for a separate trip
Hey, let's see what I can do! We may be able to swing it
All 12-14 of them ready to deposit today?
i will check with all of them right now
would their deposits need to be in by today?
Ideally! Sis they need more time?
do you think it would be easier if i gave them your number and they coordinated their own trip with you or is it easier to add them to our trip
Honestly easier to just add them in with you
ok then ideally we would add them but i think the issue is that they won't be able to pay the deposit today
When were they able to deposit?
i can check with them right now but ideally they would probably need 2-3 extra days like you gave us
Aight let me know when they respond and we'll finesse what we can
whats good Em any word on what those additional ppl want to do

hey spiffy. i'm not getting definite answers from anyone right now so honestly for now i would just hold off on that. sorry for any confusion. if they're able to give me definite answers later on i will let you know
Would be dope to get even more ppl on board with y'all
That way I can put in the request to be with yall too lol

yes i definitely think they will end up coming. it's a bunch of buys im trying to coordinate it with and they're just being impossible to give me a definite answer. I think their issue is the deposit but they said they would let me know tomorrow the exact number that would need to be added
Loved “That way I can put in the request to be with yall too lol”
okay cool. if they want a lower deposit, they could do the package without flights and get their own

hey hey, so we got two open slots rn in room 4 and 6. did they plan on only doing 3 ppl to those rooms or was there another person hopping in? Also any word on Matt Sellers, is he still going on the trip
hi sorry this is so complicated it's so hard to coordinate with this many people. matt sellers said that you said he could get an extension until winter break with a fee
i think i'll be able to fill those 2 spots waiting to hear back from some people
Matt did email me but I let him know his spot would be invalid without his 2nd payment. unless he talked to someone else I never mentioned an extension
and cool lmk about the two spots soon as possible. we have to start getting things situated with flights for those ppl if theyre hopping in
ok i'm just gonna send your number to matt so he can talk to you about it
Liked “and cool lmk about the two spots soon as possible. we have to start getting things situated with flights for those ppl if theyre hopping in”
Hi spiffy. I finally got an answer from these kids. Would you be able to add 12-13 spots and open back up the spots in the 2 rooms that only have 3 people in it
we have 2 people that will take those 2 empty spots then we were hoping to add like 12-13 more spots
And those 12-13 also want flights too right
pricing may be a little diff. and are they def ready to hop in? we'll have to move a little quickly
do you know what the pricing would be so i can tell them
it'll actually be the same rn. was just looking to double check
we can slide them in on it
ya okay they said they're in so can you add 3 more rooms of 4 and then we'll have the other 2 kids take our 2 extra spots we have rn
are they all ready to deposit the 500? I just have to let ops team know whats up so theyre not on my back lol
we're double checking on that right now
if they couldn't pay today what is like the most time you can give them like 2 days?
i know we don't have a lot of time left
yea its honestly mostly because of the flights. that just makes us have to move a little quicker
I may be able to bite another day or two. think we should be good. but the quicker the better for sure
ok i will let them know thank you i know this has been kinda confusing
Dopee. yea all good, lets make it all work out
wanna give me the green light when a few are ready? I'll open it right up
i'll double check for you right now
i don't see the spots on the link
oh wait sorry i was supposed to tell you that they're ready
some might pay tmr but i told them that's the max they can get
Lol aight bet will open rn
and those other 2 that will be hopping in room 4 and 6 are ready?
the new rooms are open now btw
everything should be good to go now

Hi Spiffy. I was gonna pay the full payment sometime within the next few days but I know you had mentioned maybe me getting it for a cheaper price for organizing this group so I just wanted to check with you.
Yea for sure. honestly hold off for now, I'm gonna adjust the payment date on your account
As long as everyone continues on paying, you should be valid for a free stay. gonna make sure I get it all cleared. but youre good for now
if you do pay, you'll be reimbursed by the discounted amount anyway. so either way works
okay ya that's awesome i'll honestly just hold off for now. I know a lot of the girls were planning on paying sometime this week
okay cool yea lmk. I saw most of the guys hopped in too
think the last one is Matthew Gillis that needs to deposit. and I spoke to Sellers. probably gonna have to do a package without flights for him later on. gonna wait to hear back from him
Yes matthew gillis should be depositing by midnight tn because i told them that was their deadline
Yo Em! Lmk when you got time to chat. I'm working some things out but operations team just lmk that flight pricing went up yesterday morning before the new 12 joined in
I'm seeing what we can do, working on it now to keep the price the same, but theres a slight chance their pricing changes by $50
Just wanted to give you the heads up, I know you talked to them about price beforehand so I'm doing what I can
okay no worries just keep me posted and i'll let them know

so to my understanding that just means that only the new people that joined yesterday might have to pay extra? the rest of us that paid the deposit awhile ago are still going for the same price correct?
yea the rest of you are all locked in. the original 30ish
this is for the new people
the OGs are locked in at the 1299. its just the new peeps from yesterday that I may have just missed the pricing before flights went up
On Sunday all looked good for the same price. monday morning things changed super quick. everyones been booking their travel like crazy
no worries that's on them for being complicated and not joining our group sooner
Lol facts. Wanna do what we can tho, still working on it
Hi Spiffy. everyone has paid for the full trip. Just checking in to see what that means for me
you're all solid locked in rolling for free. hotel stay and flight
you'll get reimbursed your deposit, there is a $175 system fee though with the package and flight
so i'll get back $325 since $175 will be taken out?
yup exactly! I'm actually gonna see if I can get that waived tho
great thank you so much! that's awesome even if you can't get it waived. when should i expect to be reimbursed
I'll start the process Monday if thats cool. I'd say max by mid Jan
as far as it getting back to your account
Hi spiffy I just heard from someone that restaurant reservations fill up last and someone said we need to book that like 2-3 weeks in advance is that true?
to my knowledge youre only able to book those in person on site. I'll ask our Cancun ops lead for confirmation just to double check

hey i know the answer is probably no but i just wanted to double check to see if we'd be able to have one more person join. i know it's most likely way too late and that's fine cause the kid was just planning on booking it on his own through the resort but i thought i would just double check with you first
hey! I'll see whats up. he probably wouldnt be able to get flights through us but ill check on that too. do you know which room he'd hop into?
i think one of the rooms only has 3 people in it so probably that one
cool so looks like i'll be able to add them in but itll be without flight tho. they'll have to get their own flight
ok sounds good let me ask him real quick to make sure he'd want to do that
just got word we can do flights but he'd be on a diff flight than everyone else
oh ok let me talk to him. are all 43 of us on the same flight? i assumed we'd all be on different flights since it's so many of us
do you know what the price would be for him if he just did it without the flight? and then what the price would be with the flight included
yea we managed to get you all on the same flight which is dope
will get pricing in a sec
hey so we're looking at $1489 to get him added in with flights, and 799 without flights
ok i will let him know thank you
i'll get back to you about what he decided as soon as he lets me know. he needs to check with pto for his new job so once he hears back from his boss he's going to let me know
do you have the details of our flight
Yea it should be all loaded into each of your accounts
yep i see it thank you
do we all have the same returning flights as well?

The flights look awesome thank you so much!! When you get the chance I just wanted to double check with what the confirmation codes for the flights were. Are the ones listed (OOZSHU) just the ones for GoBlue Tours or are those the confirmation codes we can use to log in on the American Airlines app? because when i did try the (OOZSHU) code on the American Airlines app the flight did not come up. Just wanted to double check if there was another confirmation code we should be using to view our flight?
yea I'll ask the ops team. may work a little differently since its a group booking
ya no rush at all i just had someone in our group ask me that so i thought id shoot you a text
hey my friend is gonna sign up for the one with flights should i just send him the link and have him join?
hey word let me just double check on pricing and make sure things are the same
we're good to go, gonna add the open slot to the same link, will let you know when its ready
have you also heard anything about the code for the flight? i know you said it might be different since it was a group booking but my friend keeps asking. no worries if you haven't heard anything yet
that spot is all ready. and yea just waiting to hear back on that
yea so since its a group booking, most of you will have to check in at the airport with the code on our account, your name, dob, and/or passport details
can also try online within 24 hours before the flight

there are some people that the ops team got flights for individually, mostly the 2nd group of guys you added on. those guys may be able to see their flight info on american now, before the 24 hour window. since it wasnt a part of the group booking
my friend is all set and paid for just wanted to let you know. thank you for adding that spot
Hey i was just looking at my account and it looks like this. Do you know when i should be expecting that money back onto the card i paid with
hey yea you should have gotten your reimbursement back a while ago. couple weeks ago. did you get to check the statement of the card you used?
ya i did there is nothing there except the original charge of $500 on nov 23
Hmm, let me check in with accounting in the morning and make sure they didn't miss it
Will make sure that gets to you
hey morning! just confirmed with accounting they actually did miss it. theyre processing it now! should hit your account very soon
thank you so much i can see it pending this time so it should definitely go through!
okay cool yea keep me posted

Hi Spiffy. I'm sure your being blown up by questions and i know it's early so you may not have a lot of answers. I'm just wondering if you can tell me as much as you know. Is there a possibility of getting a destination change? If not are we able to get a refund? or partial refund, how will that work? and if no refund will we get some type of credit towards a resort/airline?

Sup Em, yea its been crazy but everyones calming down now. As of now, there is no U.S. travel ban or restriction in place to Cancun and the airport, resorts, and vendors on the ground are operating normally. We have groups in Cancun right now
The US Embassy released yesterday that things are as normal in Cancun for travel
If anything were to change at the federal level that legally restricts travel, we would immediately notify all travelers and outline next steps
also or changes you'd want to look into switching destinations, we can look at the Punta Cana option at the revised package rate. Let me know if you want those details
okay great thank you! and ya if you could give me the details of switching to Punta that would be awesome! just do we know our options
will look into it for you!
did you have any other questions in the meantime? while I get this info
no i think that's answered all of them for now thank you!
Loved “will look into it for you!”

hey sorry about the late response on the Punta Cana details. right now we're offering select groups a reduced Punta Cana trip for $400. flights would have to be coordinated individually tho. if you want to explore that route just lmk
so your saying it would be $400 cheaper than what we already paid which was around 1300? and that we would have to book our own flights?
so it would be a completely new reservation. 4 nights in Punta Cana for $400
and then you'd each have to coordinate your own flights yea

the Cancun reservation, in this case, would be a complete wash. since its already settled and confirmed, and the US government released that travel is completely back to normal, resorts and airlines arent allowing us to get any credit back on cancellations
okay thank you so much for looking into that for us. for right now we're going to stick with cancun
I think hats the best bet tbh. we have groups down there now and our onsite staff too
hey how does the booze cruise work like do we need to sign up for that now before we leave or do we do it there
Yo! All when you get there. Out on site staff will help you out with everything during the check in process
They're super helpful and will walk you through it all
sup Em, just wanted to make sure everyone is all good. any questions coming up?
heyy i think we're all set for now with questions we all got our vouchers and we can see our flights on american airlines!! I'll lyk if we have any questions tho. So excited
thank you!! our flights been delayed twice hopefully everything will be figured out soon
ahh okay. yea everything will be fine
okay cool. ops team is tracking your flight #s so they are aware of everything
everyone's wondering if your here in cancun or in punta
Lolll I wish I was out there with yall
Just wanted to say thank you for all your help! we had an awesome time!!
Yo! Of course. Glad I could help you all and everything went well
Might need some of yall to leave your boy a good google review
we actually will how do we do it. send us a link
That'd be so fire thank you lol. Here's the link
It'll take you to the log in screen first before leaving the review. Like your Google log in
looked like this once i logged in
do i just google go blue tours and leave a review with your name ?
Ahh damn okay. Yea that exactly! Just type it into google and on the business panel at the top you'll see a spot to click a star rating and then it'll open up a box to leave a comment
Yea y'all can say anything simple and mention me! How much a good time it was or how much of a help I was. Whichever feels right
This link may take to you the exact spot as well
perfect that link works i'll send it to the crew
That means a lot for real! Thank you. Wish I coulda been there to party with y'all
Loved “That means a lot for real! Thank you. Wish I coulda been there to party with y'all”
